title: Pleocnemia megalocarpa
taxonomy: Pleocnemia megalocarpa is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and is a type of epiphytic plant. Pleocnemia megalocarpa is a member of the genus Pleocnemia, which is a group of ferns commonly found in Southeast Asia. The classification of Pleocnemia megalocarpa is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Pleocnemia, species P. megalocarpa. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns.
